label: Hero
prompt: Create a premium front-angle hero shot with the full product clearly visible against a clean editorial background. Preserve exact shape, color, material, branding, and construction details.

label: Lifestyle
prompt: Create a premium lifestyle image with tasteful fashion styling props and a polished editorial setting. Keep the product fully visible and unchanged in design.

label: Wearable
prompt: Create a wearable editorial shot with the product naturally styled on a model. Preserve exact product proportions, construction, branding, and visible detailing.

label: Wearable ethnic
prompt: Create a second wearable composition with a different styling direction and premium fashion context. Keep the product clearly visible and strictly faithful to the reference.

label: Jewellery Box
prompt: Create a premium product-focused composition using props or display surfaces that elevate the product while keeping it fully visible and unchanged.

label: Close Detail
prompt: Create a clean close-detail shot that highlights texture, stitching, finish, and craftsmanship without changing any product details.
